items.question: How do I update my card details?
items.answer: Go to Dashboard > Cards, pick a card, and tap Edit to update your info.

items.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
items.answer: Open Settings and choose Reset Password to follow the steps.

items.question: How do I export contacts?
items.answer: Use Export Contacts from the Settings page. Premium is required.

items.question: Can I delete my account?
items.answer: Email support@cardlink.app and we will help you with account removal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We respect your privacy and only use your data to deliver CardLink.

sections.title: Information we collect
body: We collect information you provide, such as your name, email, profile details, and card content.
We also collect basic usage data like visits, device type, and error logs.

sections.title: How we use information
body: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve CardLink, including syncing cards and processing orders.
We also use it for security, fraud prevention, account support, and service communications.

sections.title: How we share information
body: We only share data with service providers when needed to operate CardLink, such as payment and email providers.
We do not sell your personal information unless required by law or with your consent.

sections.title: Data retention
body: We keep data only as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal obligations.
You can request account deletion to remove your personal data.

sections.title: Your choices
body: You can update your profile or adjust privacy controls in Settings.
You can also contact support to access or delete your data.

sections.title: Security
body: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure.

sections.title: Changes
body: We may update this policy and will post the latest version on this page.

sections.title: Contact us
body: If you have privacy questions, email support@cardlink.app.
